name: orphaned-claim
_note: agent-a departs without releasing its claim; Core's reaper orphans the claim after COORDIFY_REAPER_TIMEOUT_MS and reclaims it after COORDIFY_ORPHAN_TTL_MS. Reclamation is unit-tested in packages/coordify-core/src/claim.rs; this fixture exercises the departure path. To observe orphan+reclaim live, run with COORDIFY_REAPER_TIMEOUT_MS=1000 COORDIFY_ORPHAN_TTL_MS=2000 and keep agent-b connected.
